BUILD.bazel.content:
"""Go library 'core' -- generated by defn gen."""

load("@io_bazel_rules_go//go:def.bzl", "go_library")
load("//kernel:fmt.bzl", "fmt_test")
load("//kernel:tagged.bzl", "tagged_file", "tagged_package")

go_library(
    name = "core",
    srcs = [
        "api_client.go",
        "client.go",
        "controller.go",
        "doc.go",
        "job_controller.go",
        "options.go",
        "process_exit.go",
    ],
    importpath = "github.com/defn/other/m/v/buildkite--agent/core",
    visibility = ["//visibility:public"],
    deps = [
        "//v/buildkite--agent/api",
        "//v/buildkite--agent/logger",
        "//v/buildkite--agent/version",
        "@com_github_buildkite_roko//:roko",
        "@com_github_denisbrodbeck_machineid//:machineid",
    ],
)

fmt_test(
    name = "build_bazel_fmt",
    src = "BUILD.bazel",
    tool = "buildifier",
)

fmt_test(
    name = "api_client_go_fmt",
    src = "api_client.go",
    tool = "gofmt",
)

fmt_test(
    name = "client_go_fmt",
    src = "client.go",
    tool = "gofmt",
)

fmt_test(
    name = "controller_go_fmt",
    src = "controller.go",
    tool = "gofmt",
)

fmt_test(
    name = "doc_go_fmt",
    src = "doc.go",
    tool = "gofmt",
)

fmt_test(
    name = "job_controller_go_fmt",
    src = "job_controller.go",
    tool = "gofmt",
)

fmt_test(
    name = "options_go_fmt",
    src = "options.go",
    tool = "gofmt",
)

fmt_test(
    name = "process_exit_go_fmt",
    src = "process_exit.go",
    tool = "gofmt",
)

fmt_test(
    name = "deps_cue_fmt",
    src = "deps.cue",
    tool = "cue",
)

tagged_file(
    name = "build_bazel_tag",
    src = "BUILD.bazel",
    tags = [
        "bazel",
        "bazel-build",
    ],
)

tagged_file(
    name = "api_client_go_tag",
    src = "api_client.go",
    tags = [
        "go",
        "source",
    ],
)

tagged_file(
    name = "client_go_tag",
    src = "client.go",
    tags = [
        "go",
        "source",
    ],
)

tagged_file(
    name = "controller_go_tag",
    src = "controller.go",
    tags = [
        "go",
        "source",
    ],
)

tagged_file(
    name = "doc_go_tag",
    src = "doc.go",
    tags = [
        "go",
        "source",
    ],
)

tagged_file(
    name = "job_controller_go_tag",
    src = "job_controller.go",
    tags = [
        "go",
        "source",
    ],
)

tagged_file(
    name = "options_go_tag",
    src = "options.go",
    tags = [
        "go",
        "source",
    ],
)

tagged_file(
    name = "process_exit_go_tag",
    src = "process_exit.go",
    tags = [
        "go",
        "source",
    ],
)

tagged_file(
    name = "deps_cue_tag",
    src = "deps.cue",
    tags = [
        "cue",
        "source",
    ],
)

tagged_package(exclude = ["api_client.go", "client.go", "controller.go", "doc.go", "job_controller.go", "options.go", "process_exit.go", "BUILD.bazel", "deps.cue"])
